title: Label Printer Troubleshooting
description: Troubleshooting guide for DYMO LabelWriter printers including setup, maintenance, and common issues.

steps.title: Connect the Printer
steps.directionHtml: Connect the USB cable to your computer and the power adapter to the printer.

steps.title: Load Labels
steps.directionHtml: Open the top cover, place the label roll on the spool with labels feeding from underneath, and feed the first label into the slot.

steps.title: Install Software
steps.directionHtml: Install DYMO Label software from www.dymo.com or use the included CD.

steps.title: Printer Not Detected
steps.directionHtml:
• Check USB cable is firmly connected
  • Try a different USB port
  • Restart the computer
  • Reinstall DYMO drivers

steps.title: Labels Not Feeding
steps.directionHtml:
• Open top cover and remove any jammed labels
  • Ensure label roll is loaded correctly with labels feeding from underneath
  • Clean the feed mechanism

steps.title: Poor Print Quality
steps.directionHtml:
• Clean the print head with a DYMO cleaning card
  • Check that you are using genuine DYMO labels
  • Avoid touching the print head directly

steps.title: Blank Labels Printing
steps.directionHtml:
• Ensure labels are loaded with the print side facing up
  • Check that label type is correctly selected in DYMO software

steps.title: Cleaning the Print Head
steps.directionHtml: Use the DYMO cleaning card. Run it through the printer 2-3 times.

steps.title: Replacing Labels
steps.directionHtml: Open top cover, remove empty spool, insert new roll, feed first label into slot, close cover.
